landing.title: Enrol at Kaleide International School
landing.subtitle: Start your application online. You can save your progress at any time and return using your email link.
landing.resume_error: We couldn't load your application. The link may have expired — enter your email below to receive a new one.
step.placeholder_body: This step will be available when we reach this stage of the process.
step.billing.title: Billing Details
step.billing.subtitle: Tax details of the person responsible for paying tuition.
step.billing.locked.title: Locked for now
step.billing.locked.body: Once your application is accepted, we will ask you here for the billing details of the payer (legal name, tax ID, and registered address).
step.gdpr.title: GDPR Consents
step.gdpr.subtitle: Data protection consents required before signing.
step.gdpr.locked.title: Locked for now
step.gdpr.locked.body: When you reach the signing stage, we will ask each guardian to provide 7 GDPR consents before generating the signing envelope.
step.signing_review.title: Document Review
step.signing_review.subtitle: Review the Admission Letter and Contract before signing.
step.signing_review.locked.title: Locked for now
step.signing_review.locked.body: Here you will be able to review and confirm the reading of the Admission Letter and the Contract before signing them electronically.
step.signing.title: Electronic Signature
step.signing.subtitle: Final signature of the enrolment documents.
step.signing.locked.title: Locked for now
step.signing.locked.body: Electronic signing of your documents via Click & Sign — available when you reach this step.
step1.subtitle: We need to verify your email address before continuing.
step1.start_date_title: When would you like your child to start?
step1.no_programs: No admission programmes are available at this time.
step2.subtitle: Add all guardians and the children you wish to enrol.
step2.recognized_body: We have the following people registered with your email. If any is the parent submitting this application, click to pre-fill:
step2.recognized_dismiss: None · continue as a new family
report.thanks_body: We have logged your report and temporarily blocked further sends to your address. Our team will review the case. You do not need to do anything else.
report.contact_hint: If you want to reach us:
wizard.abandon_confirm: Are you sure you want to discard this application and start fresh? Unsent data will be lost.
consent.already_submitted_subtitle: We already received a completed application for {{email}}. The school team will review it and get in touch with you soon.
consent.already_submitted_subtitle_sent: We found your submitted application for {{email}} and sent you a link to view it. Check your inbox.
consent.already_submitted_note: If you think this is a mistake or need help, please contact us at admissions@kaleide.org.
consent.resumed_subtitle: You already had an application in progress for {{email}}. Check your email to continue where you left off.
consent.resumed_note: If you can't find the email, check your spam folder. If you want a fresh start, click "Start over" inside the wizard after opening the link.
step3.subtitle: Specify the relationship between each guardian and each student.
step4.subtitle: Please provide health information for each student.
step4.no_applicants: Please complete the Guardians & Students step first.
relation.title: Guardians & Students
relation.subtitle: Select the relationship between each guardian and each student.
step5.subtitle: Please answer the following questions.
step5.no_questions: No questions found for this context.
step6.subtitle: Please upload the required documents. PDF, JPG, and PNG accepted (max 10 MB).
step7.subtitle: Please review your application before submitting.
step7.submitted_note: Your application is under review. The admissions team will be in touch with you shortly.
submitted.locked.title: Application under review
submitted.locked.body: Your application is being reviewed. If you need to change anything, please contact admissions at admissions@kaleide.org.
step7.esig_instructions: Type your full name below as your electronic signature.
step7.recaptcha_notice: This site is protected by reCAPTCHA and the Google Privacy Policy and Terms of Service apply.
wizard.save_later_error: Could not send link. Try again.
wizard.sending_magic_link: Sending you a magic link by email so you can continue later…
wizard.save_failed: Your progress could not be saved — please check your connection.
confirmation.title: Application submitted!
confirmation.subtitle: Thank you. We have received your enrollment application and will be in touch shortly.
confirmation.next_1: Our admissions team will review your application.
confirmation.next_2: We will contact you within 5 working days.
confirmation.next_3: You may be invited for an interview or tour.
guardian.title: Guardian {{n}}
applicant.title: Applicant {{n}}
applicant.dob_required_for_school: Please enter the date of birth before adding previous schools.
contact.emergency_note: If you wish to list someone other than the guardians above as an emergency contact, please ensure you have their consent to include their personal data.
start.disclaimer_en: The requested start date is subject to confirmation by the school and may be adjusted based on availability and intake scheduling.
start.disclaimer_es: La fecha de inicio solicitada está sujeta a confirmación por parte del centro y puede ser modificada en función de la disponibilidad y la planificación de incorporaciones.
doc.drag_or_click: Drag & drop or click to upload
consent.page_subtitle: Before we begin, please read and accept our data protection terms.
consent.sent_subtitle: We've sent an application link to {{email}}
consent.sent_note: Click the link in the email to start your application. Please also check your spam folder. You can close this window.
consent.gdpr_en: I consent to the collection and processing of my personal data in accordance with Kaleide International School's Privacy Policy and applicable data protection legislation (GDPR).
consent.gdpr_es: Consiento la recogida y el tratamiento de mis datos personales de acuerdo con la Política de Privacidad de Kaleide International School y la legislación de protección de datos aplicable (RGPD).
consent.gdpr_accept: I accept the data protection terms / Acepto los términos de protección de datos
consent.legal_en: I confirm that the information provided in this application is accurate and complete to the best of my knowledge.
consent.legal_es: Confirmo que la información proporcionada en esta solicitud es exacta y completa según mi leal saber y entender.
legal.privacy_placeholder: The full privacy policy text will be available shortly.
error.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
error.guardian_required: Please complete at least one guardian.
error.applicant_required: Please complete at least one applicant.
error.person_name_required: {{name}} must have a first and last name.
error.relation_type_required: Please select a relationship type for all guardians.
error.esig_required: Please sign with your full name.
error.recaptcha_failed: Security check failed. Please try again.
error.custodial_required: At least one guardian must have custodial or pick-up authorization.
locked.message: This section is saved and locked.
signing.no_token_body: You need the link from your email to access this page.
signing.invalid_body: This link is not valid. Please use the link you received in the admissions email.
signing.expired_body: The signing period has expired. Please contact the admissions team to continue.
signing.revoked_body: The enrolment process has already been completed. If you have any questions, please contact admissions.
signing.gdpr_blocked_body: Data processing consent was declined. To continue, please contact the admissions team.
signing.ready_subtitle: Complete the steps below to finalise enrolment.
signing.steps_coming: Signing steps will be available soon.
signing.generic_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
signing.billing.title: Billing details
signing.billing.subtitle: Tax details of the person responsible for the enrolment payment.
signing.billing.err_name: Please enter the holder's name or company name.
signing.billing.err_email: Please enter a valid billing email.
signing.billing.err_locked: This application is no longer editable.
signing.gdpr.title: Data protection consents
signing.gdpr.subtitle: Tick the consents you authorise. The first (GDPR) is required to continue.
signing.gdpr.must_accept_blocking: You must accept personal data processing (GDPR) to continue.
signing.gdpr.blocked: Rejecting data processing means signing cannot continue. Please contact admissions.
signing.review.title: Document review
signing.review.subtitle: Review the Admission Letter and the Contract before signing them.
signing.review.package_loading: The contract package is being prepared. Please come back in a few minutes.
signing.review.confirm_label: I have read and understand the content of the documents.
signing.review.must_read: Please confirm you have read the documents to continue.
signing.signing.title: Electronic signature
signing.signing.subtitle: Sign the documents with Click & Sign. This page will refresh automatically when complete.
signing.signing.completed_body: Thank you. We have received your signature. The admissions team will continue the process.
stepup.title: Security verification
stepup.subtitle: To protect this data, we'll send a verification code to your email. You don't need to re-enter your email.
stepup.code_sent: We've sent a code to your email.
stepup.err_too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment before trying again.
stepup.err_rate_limited: You've requested too many codes. Please try again in a few minutes.
stepup.err_generic: We couldn't verify the code. Please try again.
stepup.pii_masked_body: Date of birth, identity document and address are hidden. Verify to view them.
stepup.health_masked_body: Health data is especially sensitive and stays hidden. Verify with a code to show it.
stepup.review_masked_body: The summary contains sensitive data (date of birth, identity document, address and health). It stays hidden until you verify your identity with a fresh code sent to your email.
stepup.review_reveal_prompt: Verify to show your application summary
stepup.sign_gate_body: Before signing, confirm your identity with a verification code.
stepup.review_gate_body: Before reviewing the contract package, confirm your identity with a verification code.
